title: Speaking - Part 3
description: You are going to read a magazine article about an intellectual process known as critical thinking. For questions 31 – 36, choose the answer (A, B, C or D) which you think fits best according to the text. Mark your answers on the separate answer sheet.

content.task: Discuss how the following developments have changed the world of art, then decide which two are the most positive for artists.

script.text: Now, I’d like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some modern developments in the art world.
Now decide which two developments offer the best opportunities for artists today.
